race.comment: Several win chances in this. HE'S ON SONG (8) returned from a spell over a mile and wound up strongly to finish fifth, beaten only a length. Fitter and has good upside at just third career outing. Extra trip looks a plus and will go close with a repeat. FINANCE MERCHANT (6) ran fourth on debut then spelled again. Has raced twice this campaign for two placings and looks close to break through. Extra trip is a plus and will wind up late. STARTYOURENGINE (14) ran a much improved race at second out and looks suited by the longer journey. Has upside and is worth following up. BLUE ENSIGN (4) races on speed and will give a sight.
